description: perry ellis Reserve perfume for women gives a sense of total harmony, achieved with a blend of soft florally, exotic woods and sensuous, warm notes. As the fragrance unfolds, mid notes of yellow freesia, marigold, lotus blossom, white violet and night blooming lily are introduced.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
